items.name: utils
items.title: cn utility
items.description: clsx + tailwind-merge class merger used by every astro-shad component.

items.name: motion
items.title: Motion runtime
items.description: Tier-1 motion system (docs/plans/motion-system.md): zero-dependency WAAPI runtime. Full preset set -- fade family (5), slide family (4), scale-in/out, rotate, blur-in, color, bg -- plus motionStagger() for sibling stagger, three triggers (load/in-view/hover), FOUC pre-hide CSS, and prefers-reduced-motion handling. Bootstrap the pre-hide style + initMotion() once per page -- see the file header for usage.

items.name: forms
items.title: Form security & mailer toolkit
items.description: Shared server-side building blocks for form POST endpoints: honeypot spam signal (isHoneypotTripped), HTML-escaping for email bodies (escapeHtml), a provider-agnostic mailer (createResendMailer / createCloudflareMailer), and captcha verification for bulk spam protection (verifyTurnstile / verifyRecaptcha). No runtime dependencies -- fetch/FormData are native.

items.name: theme
items.title: astro-shad theme tokens
items.description: Three-layer token contract: shadcn slot vars, semantic utilities, slot-to-utility bridge. Neutral values -- override per brand.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: shadcn button converted to a self-contained .astro file. Renders <a> when href is given, <button> otherwise. Zero client JS.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: shadcn badge converted to a self-contained .astro file. Renders <a> when href is given, <span> otherwise. Zero client JS.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: shadcn card collapsed into one .astro file: title/description props plus header, default, and footer slots. Zero client JS.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: shadcn tabs with Radix replaced by minimal vanilla JS. Tabs declared as a prop, panels as named slots. Click + arrow-key activation, ARIA wired.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: shadcn accordion with Radix replaced by minimal vanilla JS. Accordion root + AccordionItem, single/multiple modes, CSS grid-rows height animation.

items.name: accordion-02
items.title: Accordion 02
items.description: Style variant of accordion: boxed -- each item is a separate rounded card with a gap. Same vanilla JS behaviour (single/multiple, grid-rows animation), fully self-contained.

items.name: accordion-03
items.title: Accordion 03
items.description: Style variant of accordion: flat divided list with an icon slot per item and swap-on-open chevrons. Same vanilla JS behaviour (single/multiple, grid-rows animation), fully self-contained.

items.name: glass-icon
items.title: Glass Icon
items.description: react-bits GlassIcons converted to a self-contained .astro tile: glass front, accent back plate (any CSS color, defaults to --primary), hover label. Zero client JS.

items.name: folder
items.title: Folder
items.description: react-bits Folder converted to CSS boxes + one delegated vanilla JS script: open/close toggle, fanning papers, cursor-magnet drift. Color via any CSS color prop.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: shadcn pagination as pure anchor markup -- page position is URL state, so zero client JS ships. Windowing math runs in frontmatter; icons are inline SVG.

items.name: bubble-menu
items.title: Bubble Menu
items.description: react-bits BubbleMenu minus react + gsap: staggered pill open/close via CSS transitions keyed off one data-state attribute, delays baked at build time. Per-item hover color prop.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: react-less counterpart of shadcn Form (react-hook-form + zod): native Constraint Validation API, validate-on-submit with reward-early revalidation, inline errors. Form + FormField.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: shadcn DatePicker without Popover/react-day-picker: real text input with a date pattern plus a vanilla JS month-grid popover. Follows the Form/FormField validation conventions.

items.name: magic-bento
items.title: Magic Bento
items.description: Bento layout grid + cell card. Zero JS: hover glow is a pure CSS keyframe gradient sweep (glow/glowColors props); cells size via span=default|wide|tall. MagicBento + BentoCard.

items.name: text-type
items.title: Text Type
items.description: react-bits TextType (typewriter) minus react: types, holds, deletes, cycles. First string server-rendered for no-JS/reduced-motion; caret rides currentColor.

items.name: rotating-text
items.title: Rotating Text
items.description: react-bits RotatingText minus react: per-instance keyframes generated in frontmatter, all words stacked in one inline-grid cell. Wrapper width animates to the current word (words measured after fonts.ready feed a var-driven width keyframe track); without JS it falls back to fitting the longest word.

items.name: split-text
items.title: Split Text
items.description: react-bits SplitText minus react + gsap: the word/char split happens at build time in frontmatter; an IntersectionObserver flips one attribute and CSS staggers the reveal.

items.name: count-up
items.title: Count Up
items.description: react-bits CountUp minus react: final value server-rendered as real text; one rAF loop eases up from `from` when scrolled into view, formatted by Intl.NumberFormat.

items.name: curved-loop
items.title: Curved Loop
items.description: react-bits CurvedLoop minus react: marquee text on an SVG path via textPath startOffset, measured after document.fonts.ready. Experimental `path` prop accepts a custom SVG path.

items.name: top-bar
items.title: Top Bar
items.description: Full-width site header: edge-to-edge bar with bottom border, contained inner row, optional brand/nav/actions slots. Zero client JS. Sibling of floating-header.

items.name: floating-header
items.title: Floating Header
items.description: Floating site header: detached radius-adjustable pill (translucent card fill + blur) with brand/nav/actions slots. Zero client JS. Sibling of top-bar.

items.name: logo-loop
items.title: Logo Loop
items.description: react-bits LogoLoop minus react. ZERO client JS: classic duplicated-track CSS marquee with edge fade mask, speed/gap/pauseOnHover knobs.

items.name: logos-carousel
items.title: Logos Carousel
items.description: Rotating alternative to logo-loop's marquee: groups of logos swap in place, exiting upward with a blur while the next group rises in. Each direct child is one group; minimal vanilla JS interval flips one data-state per group, static CSS keyframes animate.

items.name: highlighted-text
items.title: Highlighted Text
items.description: motion/react HighlightedText minus react and motion: a foreground mark slides in behind the text (from any edge) and mix-blend-difference inverts the text as it passes -- theme-proof with zero extra colors. Plays on load or on scroll into view (inView/once).

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button Group
items.description: shadcn base-ui button group converted to pure child-combinator CSS: children lose inner radii and collapse shared borders, horizontal or vertical. ButtonGroup + ButtonGroupText + ButtonGroupSeparator (separator inlined -- no separator primitive needed). Zero client JS.

items.name: pulse-grid
items.title: Pulse Grid
items.description: react-bits CursorGrid minus react and minus the cursor: an ambient canvas grid where random speed-driven bursts light up cells that hold and fade, optionally as expanding rings, in one or more colors. Pointer-events-none absolute layer built for a section's background slot; self-suspends when idle or off-screen, static lattice under reduced motion.

items.name: pixel-transition
items.title: Pixel Transition
items.description: react-bits PixelTransition minus react and gsap: two stacked content layers swap under a random-order pixel flash on hover/tap/focus. The gsap stagger is rebuilt as per-pixel random delay custom properties baked at build time driving zero-length steps(1) CSS animations; the layer swap is a delayed visibility transition. pixelColor takes any CSS color including tokens.

items.name: hero-01
items.title: Hero 01 — centered
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: full-height hero (min-h-svh), centered content stack over an Unsplash demo image + scrim in the background slot (swap for a local asset). Customise by editing the installed copy (copy-and-own).

items.name: hero-02
items.title: Hero 02 — bottom-left
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: full-height hero with content anchored bottom-left (editorial composition) over an Unsplash demo image + bottom gradient scrim in the background slot (swap for a local asset).

items.name: hero-03
items.title: Hero 03 — centered + feature strip
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: full-height centered hero with an auto-fit 3-4 column card strip anchored at the bottom edge, over an Unsplash demo image + scrim in the background slot (swap for a local asset).

items.name: hero-04
items.title: Hero 04 — split + feature row
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: split hero — headline/actions left, media panel right, icon-feature card row beneath. Simplified from a shadcn-studio restaurant hero; the media panel stands in for its carousel until the carousel primitive ships.

items.name: gsap-hero-01
items.title: GSAP Hero 01 — scroll parallax
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: full-height hero with a ScrollTrigger-scrubbed parallax background layer. First tier-2 (GSAP) item in the registry (docs/plans/motion-system.md Phase 2) — opt-in, scoped to this item only. Genuine ScrollTrigger use case (continuous scroll-linked scrub), not something the zero-dependency @astro-shad/motion runtime covers. Consumer owns nothing extra: gsap installs alongside this item only.

items.name: split-01
items.title: Split 01 — media + content
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: normal-height half/half split, media placeholder surface beside the content stack (swap the div for your img/video), reverse prop flips sides at md+.

items.name: feature-grid-01
items.title: Feature Grid 01 — heading + card grid
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: centered heading block above a 3/4-column card grid (columns prop). Swap the demo Cards for your own cells; customise by editing the installed copy.

items.name: feature-section-01
items.title: Feature Section 01 — header + icon card grid
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: left-aligned header block (heading / subtext / outline CTA) above a 2/3-column grid of six icon feature cards. Icon tiles are token-tinted divs with inline lucide SVGs; zero client JS. Customise by editing the FEATURES array and copy in the installed file.

items.name: feature-section-02
items.title: Feature Section 02 — testimonial panel + icon cards
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: badge/heading/CTA header row above a half/half grid — testimonial card over an Unsplash image panel left, 2x2 muted icon cards right. motion/react entrance animations rebuilt as CSS transitions off one data-inview attribute (IntersectionObserver, reduced-motion safe).

items.name: cta-01
items.title: CTA 01 — centered band
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: narrow centered call-to-action band on a card surface, Unsplash demo image + scrim in the in-band background slot (alternate image URL commented beside it; swap for a local asset).

items.name: cta-02
items.title: CTA 02 — animated band
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: narrow centered call-to-action band on a card surface with the pulse-grid canvas animation as the background slot fallback (two demo colors + faint lattice; tune the props in place or fill the slot to replace the layer).

items.name: map
items.title: Map
items.description: MapLibre GL map family ported from mapcn (React) to vanilla JS: Map container (Carto light/dark basemaps with live theme tracking, blank tile-less mode, globe projection), MapMarker with popup/tooltip/label slots, MapControls (zoom / compass / locate / fullscreen), and standalone MapPopup annotations pinned to coordinates. First runtime npm dep in the registry: maplibre-gl (WebGL cannot be static output). The consumer owns the container height — h-full against an unsized parent renders a 0px map.

items.name: map-geojson
items.title: Map GeoJSON
items.description: GeoJSON fill + outline layers for the astro-shad Map — choropleths, districts, delivery zones; pairs with the blank basemap. Theme-aware monochrome paint defaults, hover feature-state via promoteId (hover paint merged as case expressions), click/hover CustomEvents with feature payloads. Re-adds itself on map:style-load so it survives theme-driven basemap swaps.

items.name: map-route
items.title: Map Route
items.description: Line layer for the astro-shad Map: draws a GeoJSON route from a coordinates array — color/width/opacity/dash props, pointer cursor + route CustomEvents on hover/click. First layer child of the map family: re-adds itself on map:style-load so it survives theme-driven basemap swaps.
